items.title: Apple Cash is down for some iPhone users in the U.S.
items.summary: If you've been unable to use Apple Cash over the last few hours, you're not alone, as the service is currently experiencing an outage affecting some users in the U.S. Here are the details.

items.title: 10 Useful iPhone Tips and Tricks You Might Not Know About
items.summary: Over the years, the iPhone's operating system has gotten complicated. Apple adds new features with every version of iOS, and many of them aren't always obvious, leading to hidden iPhone capabilities you might not be aware of. The tips...

items.title: Apple discounts iPhone in China ahead of annual 618 shopping festival
items.summary: As it has done since at least 2021 , Apple is discounting the iPhone in China as part of the country's 618 shopping festival. Here are the details.

items.title: AirPods Max designer reveals project details in new interview
items.summary: Eugene Whang, a former Apple hardware designer who spent 22 years at the company before following Jony Ive to LoveFrom, has shared new details about the development of AirPods Max in an interview with Highsnobiety . Here are the details.

items.title: SwitchBot Launches Two Matter Smart Locks With 3D Facial Recognition
items.summary: SwitchBot today debuted the SwitchBot Lock Vision and the Lock Vision Pro, two Matter-enabled smart locks that include facial recognition technology for quick door unlocking. With Matter-over-WiFi, the locks are compatible with HomeKit and...

items.title: Podcast: Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator is live, China is taking over EU factories, and
items.summary: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week's episode, we discuss updates to Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator going live, China taking over EU factories,...

items.title: Micro-Transfer Printing (MTP) As A Promising Scalable Approach to Heterogeneous Integration for Silicon Photonics (Ghent U., imec et al)
items.summary: A new technical paper, "Micro-Transfer Printing on Silicon Photonics: Tutorial, Recent Progress and Outlook," was published by researchers at Ghent University, imec et al. Abstract "This paper highlights micro-transfer printing (MTP) as a...

items.title: Silicon Valley's vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
items.summary: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

items.title: Pennsylvania residents complain they are being 'bulldozed' over AI data center concerns - lambast Gov. Shapiro in two-hour town hall, say he is losing support base
items.summary: Pennsylvania residents blame Governor Josh Shapiro for the large number of data center projects in the state, despite his efforts to introduce policies that will balance development with the welfare of the people.

items.title: Training-Free BLE Beacon Detection of Freight Wagon Direction at Railway Control Points
items.summary: New research proposes a low-infrastructure way to detect whether a freight wagon has entered or exited a station control point using Bluetooth Low Energy RSSI signals. The system uses Eddystone-TLM BLE beacons mounted on wagon bodies and...
